src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Add a new controller endpoint to retrieve articles filtered by location fields (country and city).
Remove the deprecated `readArticles` method that was marked for deletion.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.human_impl:
-    // Seems will be deleted
-    @Deprecated
-    public List<ArticleDto> readArticles(...)

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Change the mapping path of the paged articles endpoint from root to '/all' to avoid conflict or ambiguity.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Replace the generic String field for JSON data with a strongly typed LocationDto object to support structured JSONB search.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.human_impl: private String jsonData; -> private LocationDto location;

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Extend the repository interface with a custom interface to support complex queries not supported by standard Spring Data methods.
Add a derived query method to search articles by country and city fields.
Replace the generic String field for JSONB data with a dedicated Location type to improve type safety and code clarity.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.human_impl: Changed field type from 'String jsonData' to 'Location location' and updated the @Column annotation.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/se.general_idea: Add a new method to the service interface to support searching articles by location fields.
Import java.util.List to support the return type of the new method.
Implement the service layer method to retrieve articles filtered by country and city fields within a JSONB column.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/se.human_impl: Added getArticleByLocation method calling articleRepository.getArticleByCountryNCity and mapping results to DTOs.

src/test/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/In.general_idea: Upgrade the PostgreSQL container version used in integration tests from 9.6 to 15.2 to align with the JDK 17 migration and modernize the test environment.

src/test/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/Sp.general_idea: Update test to use a dedicated DTO object instead of a raw JSON string for the location field.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target version from 11 to 17 to align with the JDK 17 migration.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 2.5.12 to ensure compatibility with JDK 17.
Update MapStruct to version 1.5.3.Final to support JDK 17 and fix potential annotation processing issues.
Update Lombok to version 1.18.26 to ensure compatibility with JDK 17 and MapStruct.
Reorder annotation processor paths to place Lombok before MapStruct, ensuring correct interaction between the two libraries.
Upgrade Testcontainers PostgreSQL module to 1.17.6 for better stability and JDK 17 support.
Add the JaCoCo Maven plugin to generate code coverage reports during the test phase.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 9 to align with the project's migration to Java 17.
Integrate the JaCoCo badge generator action to automatically create and commit coverage badges based on test results.
Upload the generated JaCoCo HTML coverage report as a build artifact for inspection.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the logs directory to .gitignore to prevent log files from being tracked in version control.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the Docker base image from OpenJDK 15 to OpenJDK 17 to align with the target JDK version.
Update the exposed port in the Dockerfile from 8099 to 9080.
